text.title: gateway-fallback-chain Output Contract
text.summary: Call request body schema (primary + fallback chain) and OTel span attribute set.

section.title: Call request body schema

list.item: `gen_ai.system`: provider name of the call that actually succeeded.
`gen_ai.usage.fallback_count`: how many providers were tried before success.
`gen_ai.usage.cost_usd`: billed cost for the successful call.

example.note: Three distinct providers; outage of any one routes traffic to the next.
All three are Anthropic; vendor outage takes the whole chain down. Validator rejects.

list.item: `models` has at least 2 entries from distinct providers.
4xx errors are propagated to the caller; gateway does NOT silently retry on 400/401/422.
